{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Forged snakes
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] uses a [[Forged]] snake technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
